_doc: Mocks a Xero invoice sync. The platform's Xero connector creates an expenditure row + EXPENDITURE_INGESTED chain event. Then the consultant maps it to the supporting external-lab activity via POST /v1/expenditures/:id/map, which emits an EXPENDITURE_MAPPED event.

line_items.description: Phase-stability testing — gamma-prime XRD scan, N12 specimen

map_rationale: Bluescope is the external-lab contractor for the Vantage-7 phase-stability program; their testing supports the core activity without performing it.
